query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A slim vertical opening near the center of an otherwise black frame reveals a small section of pale, indistinct surface or form, with a separate, smaller bright fragment visible beneath it.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Extreme underexposure crushes the entire frame into near-total blackness, leaving only a thin vertical slit of pale light near the center where an obscured shape is faintly visible; the overwhelming surrounding darkness creates a suffocating, dread-inducing atmosphere.
